title: Intensely Earthy Greek Spinach Spanakopita
description: This earthy, gooey Greek dish is a perfect hangover cure, featuring ginger paste and infused oil, making it high-protein-friendly and delicious.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the infused oil over medium heat.
Add the ginger paste to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the spinach to the skillet and cook until wilted, about 3-4 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and feta cheese.
Add the cooked spinach mixture to the bowl and stir to combine.
Layer the filo dough in a large baking dish, brushing each layer with infused oil.
Pour the spinach and egg mixture into the baking dish and top with remaining filo dough.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the filo dough is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
